get.summary:
ListCalcJobs returns a paginated list of calc jobs with optional filters.
Required permission: finance.cost.caljob.view.

parameters.name: calculationType
parameters.description:
Optional calculation type filter (UNSPECIFIED = no filter).

 - CALCULATION_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update; ignored as filter.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_ACTUAL: Actual cost based on realized RM rates.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_FORECAST: Forecast cost using forward-looking rates.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_SELLING: Selling-side cost projection.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
Optional status filter (UNSPECIFIED = no filter).

 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update; ignored as filter.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_QUEUED: Job created, waiting for planner.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_PLANNING: Planner is expanding products + chunks.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_PROCESSING: Chunks dispatched, workers running.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_SUCCESS: All products calculated successfully.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_PARTIAL_FAILED: Some products failed, others succeeded.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_FAILED: Job failed at planning or all chunks failed.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_CANCELLED: Operator cancelled the job.

post.summary:
TriggerCalcJob creates a new calc job batch.
Scope determines whether it covers a single product, a route, a filtered
set, or ALL products. Required permission: finance.cost.caljob.trigger.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: TriggerCalcJobRequest creates a new calc job batch.

get.summary:
GetCalcJob fetches one calc job by id.
Required permission: finance.cost.caljob.view.

post.summary:
CancelCalcJob cancels a running calc job.
Required permission: finance.cost.caljob.cancel.

get.summary:
ListCalcJobChunks returns chunks belonging to one job.
Required permission: finance.cost.caljob.view.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
Optional chunk status filter (UNSPECIFIED = no filter).

 - CHUNK_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_QUEUED: Chunk queued, not yet dispatched.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_DISPATCHED: Chunk dispatched to a worker.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_PROCESSING: Worker is processing the chunk.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_SUCCESS: All products in chunk succeeded.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_PARTIAL_FAILED: Some products in chunk failed.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_FAILED: All products in chunk failed.

get.summary:
ListCalcJobProducts returns per-product execution rows for one job.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
Optional product status filter (UNSPECIFIED = no filter).

 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_PENDING: Awaiting upstream waves to finish.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_READY: Inputs ready, awaiting worker.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_CALCULATING: Worker calculating now.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_SUCCESS: Cost calculated successfully.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_FAILED: Calculation failed for this product.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_BLOCKED: Blocked by upstream failure or missing inputs.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_SKIPPED: Skipped (e.g., no active route).

v1CalJobProduct.description: CalJobProduct is per-product execution row inside a job.

v1CalcJobScope.description:
CalcJobScope describes what set of products the job covers.

 - CALC_JOB_SCOPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for trigger.
 - CALC_JOB_SCOPE_ALL: All eligible products for the period.
 - CALC_JOB_SCOPE_FILTERED: Subset selected by product_filter_json.
 - CALC_JOB_SCOPE_SINGLE_PRODUCT: A single product target.
 - CALC_JOB_SCOPE_SINGLE_ROUTE: A single route head target.

v1CalcJobStatus.description:
CalcJobStatus is the lifecycle status of a calc job batch.

 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update; ignored as filter.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_QUEUED: Job created, waiting for planner.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_PLANNING: Planner is expanding products + chunks.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_PROCESSING: Chunks dispatched, workers running.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_SUCCESS: All products calculated successfully.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_PARTIAL_FAILED: Some products failed, others succeeded.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_FAILED: Job failed at planning or all chunks failed.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_CANCELLED: Operator cancelled the job.

v1CalculationType.description:
CalculationType selects the costing flavor for a job/result.

 - CALCULATION_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update; ignored as filter.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_ACTUAL: Actual cost based on realized RM rates.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_FORECAST: Forecast cost using forward-looking rates.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_SELLING: Selling-side cost projection.

v1ChunkStatus.description:
ChunkStatus is the lifecycle status of an individual chunk.

 - CHUNK_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_QUEUED: Chunk queued, not yet dispatched.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_DISPATCHED: Chunk dispatched to a worker.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_PROCESSING: Worker is processing the chunk.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_SUCCESS: All products in chunk succeeded.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_PARTIAL_FAILED: Some products in chunk failed.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_FAILED: All products in chunk failed.

paramSnapshot.description: Snapshot of parameters used (key = param_code, val = stringified float).

v1CostHistoryEntry.description: CostHistoryEntry is one row in the versioned cost history.

refLabel.description: Resolved display label for the ref.

v1CostRMDetail.description: CostRMDetail is one RM input edge contribution to the cost.

routeHeadId.description: Route head used for the calculation.

totalRmCost.description: Aggregate RM cost for this product (sum of unit × ratio across stages).

jobId.description: Job id that produced this row.

calculatedBy.description: User who triggered the calc (resolved label).

v1CostResult.description: CostResult is the persisted cost summary for a product/period/type.

v1CostResultStatus.description:
CostResultStatus is the lifecycle status of a stored cost result.

 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update.
 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_CALCULATED: Freshly calculated, awaiting review.
 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_VERIFIED: Verified by a reviewer.
 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_APPROVED: Approved for downstream use.
 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_SUPERSEDED: Replaced by a newer version.

outputParamCode.description: Output parameter code this formula assigns.

v1FormulaEval.description: FormulaEval traces one formula evaluation step.

breakdown.description: Full breakdown: summary + by-level + rm details + formula trace.

v1GetCostResultResponse.description: GetCostResultResponse returns the requested cost result.

v1JobProductStatus.description:
JobProductStatus is the per-product execution status inside a job.

 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_PENDING: Awaiting upstream waves to finish.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_READY: Inputs ready, awaiting worker.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_CALCULATING: Worker calculating now.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_SUCCESS: Cost calculated successfully.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_FAILED: Calculation failed for this product.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_BLOCKED: Blocked by upstream failure or missing inputs.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_SKIPPED: Skipped (e.g., no active route).

v1CostProductParameterValue.description:
CostProductParameterValue is a single param value bound to a product.
Exactly one of value_numeric / value_text / value_flag is populated per row,
matching the data_type of the referenced parameter.

hasValue.description: Existing value (zero/empty when not yet bound).

v1RequiredParamEntry.description:
RequiredParamEntry surfaces a required mst_parameter row that may or may not
yet have a value bound for the product (used by ListProductRequiredParams).

valueFlag.description:
value_flag is a real bool — we cannot distinguish "unset" from FALSE, so
callers must use has_value_flag to opt in.

CostProductRequestServiceMarkParameterCo.description:
MarkParameterComplete moves PARAMETER_PENDING → PARAMETER_COMPLETE.
The handler verifies all promoted products have their required CAPP params
filled before allowing the transition.

existingProductSysId.description:
Existing product the request reuses costing from — recorded on the
request so QUOTE_READY traces back to a concrete product master.
When UseExistingCosting was invoked, points to the product master whose costing is reused. 0 = none.

linkedRouteHeadId.description: Active route head linked to this request (many requests → one route head when spec matches).

missingProducts.description:
missing_products lists product_sys_ids that still have required params unfilled
when the transition is blocked. Empty when the response is_success = true.

mentionedUserIds.description: Mentioned user_ids extracted from body_plaintext on create/update.
Optional @mentions extracted client-side; backend re-extracts to be safe.

typeName.description:
reference_target + allow_sub_sequence are IMMUTABLE after create (would break
existing components that depend on them); only display + active flag editable.

v1CostRouteHead.description:
CostRouteHead is the per-product released routing aggregate.
One non-LOCKED head per product (UK by cpm_product_sys_id).

CostRouteRm is one input edge feeding a SEQ.
Exactly one of (rm_product_sys_id, rm_item_code, rm_group_code) is set,
matching rm_type.

v1CostRouteSeq.description: CostRouteSeq is one stage of the route at a given level + ordering.

Full set of seqs that should exist after the save. Server deletes any
pre-existing seqs and rms for this product's routing and re-inserts these.

v1CstRouteHead.description: CstRouteHead is the routing root for a CST_PRODUCT (one active per product).

routeRmRatio.title: decimal as string (avoid float precision loss in JSON)

v1CstRouteRm.description:
CstRouteRm is a raw-material consumption line under a route seq.
rm_type=ITEM|GROUP references cst_rm_cost; rm_type=PRODUCT references another
CST_PRODUCT (an intermediate routed elsewhere).

productId.description:
Optional: when this seq represents another CST_PRODUCT (intermediate), this
points to it. Empty for non-product seqs.

v1CstRouteSeq.description:
CstRouteSeq is one node inside the routing tree. route_level=1 is the finished
good; deeper levels are intermediate steps or raw material categories.

head.description:
head may be null when the product has no routing yet — base.is_success is
still true in that case.

routeRmRatio.description: Decimal as string to preserve precision over JSON.

v1SaveRmInput.description:
SaveRmInput is one raw-material line. parent_seq_client_id MUST match an
input seq's seq_client_id in the same call.

v1SaveSeqInput.description:
SaveSeqInput is the input shape for one routing seq. seq_client_id is a
caller-generated stable ID (any string) used to link child rms to their
parent seq inside the same Save call. The server allocates real UUIDs and
does not echo seq_client_id back.

 - JOB_STATUS_PROCESSING: Job is currently being processed.
 - JOB_STATUS_SUCCESS: Job completed successfully.
 - JOB_STATUS_FAILED: Job failed.
 - JOB_STATUS_CANCELLED: Job was cancelled.

v1RMCostTriggerReason.description:
RMCostTriggerReason enumerates the reasons a calculation was run. Mirrors
`rmcost.HistoryTriggerReason`.

 - RM_COST_TRIGGER_REASON_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Rejected on trigger requests via not_in: [0].
 - RM_COST_TRIGGER_REASON_ORACLE_SYNC_CHAIN: Auto-chained after a successful Oracle sync for the synced period.
 - RM_COST_TRIGGER_REASON_GROUP_UPDATE: Group header changed.
 - RM_COST_TRIGGER_REASON_DETAIL_CHANGE: An item was added/removed/toggled in the group.
 - RM_COST_TRIGGER_REASON_MANUAL_UI: Explicit user request from the UI.

v1RMCostType.description:
RMCostType discriminates a group-level cost row from an item-level cost row.

 - RM_COST_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Means "no filter" in list requests.
 - RM_COST_TYPE_GROUP: Cost row aggregates a whole RM group.
 - RM_COST_TYPE_ITEM: Cost row is computed for a single item (future phase).

v1RMGroupFlag.description:
RMGroupFlag identifies which aggregated stage rate feeds a cost purpose
(valuation / marketing / simulation), or whether the group uses its
configured init override value. Mirrors the `cst_rm_group_head.flag_*`
domain constraint.

 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Rejected on create/update requests via not_in: [0].
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_INIT: Use the init_val_* override on the head; skips cascade.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_CONS: Use the CONS stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_STORES: Use the STORES stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_DEPT: Use the DEPT stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_PO_1: Use the first PO stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_PO_2: Use the second PO stage rate.
 - RM_GROUP_FLAG_PO_3: Use the third PO stage rate.

v1RMMarketingFlag.description:
RMMarketingFlag selects which computed marketing projection becomes
`cost_mark`. UNSPECIFIED behaves as AUTO (SP → PP → FP fallback).

 - RM_MARKETING_FLAG_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Treated as AUTO (SP→PP→FP fallback).
 - RM_MARKETING_FLAG_SP: Projection Stock Landed Cost.
 - RM_MARKETING_FLAG_PP: Projection PO Landed Cost.
 - RM_MARKETING_FLAG_FP: Projection Fix Value Landed Cost.

v1RMValuationFlag.description:
RMValuationFlag selects which computed rate becomes `cost_val` in the
RM Cost row. UNSPECIFIED behaves as AUTO (CL → SL → FL fallback, where
FL incorporates the per-detail valuation_default_value).

 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Treated as AUTO (CL→SL→FL fallback).
 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_CR: Use Consumption Rate (CR) — group-total cons_val / cons_qty.
 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_SR: Use Stock Rate (SR) — group-total stock_val / stock_qty.
 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_PR: Use PO Rate (PR) — group-total po_val / po_qty.
 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_CL: Use Consumption Landed Cost (CL) — group-total CL aggregate.
 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_SL: Use Stock Landed Cost (SL) — group-total SL aggregate.
 - RM_VALUATION_FLAG_FL: Use Fix Landed Cost (FL) — MAX of per-detail FL.

compatibility; when both are supplied, `selections` wins.

v1RMGroupingScope.description:
RMGroupingScope filters the grouping monitor view by whether each
(item_code, grade_code) pair is currently assigned to an active RM group.
Status is evaluated cross-period — group membership is master data and
does not depend on the period the item appeared in the sync feed.

 - RM_GROUPING_SCOPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Treated as UNGROUPED.
 - RM_GROUPING_SCOPE_UNGROUPED: Items not assigned to any active group (deleted/inactive details count
as ungrouped — operator must reassign to surface the item again).
 - RM_GROUPING_SCOPE_GROUPED: Items with at least one active, non-deleted detail row in any group.

v1RemoveItemsMode.description:
RemoveItemsMode controls how RemoveItems disposes of detail rows.

 - REMOVE_ITEMS_MODE_UNSPECIFIED: Default zero value. Rejected via not_in: [0].
 - REMOVE_ITEMS_MODE_DEACTIVATE: Mark the details inactive but keep the rows for audit history.
 - REMOVE_ITEMS_MODE_SOFT_DELETE: Soft-delete the details (sets deleted_at/deleted_by).

v1UngroupedItem.description:
UngroupedItem represents one (item_code, grade_code) pair viewed through the
grouping monitor. Used by both UNGROUPED and GROUPED scopes — the group_*
fields are populated only when the item is assigned to an active group.

Per-period qty/rate snapshot fields were removed (reserved 1, 8-25) because
the monitor view is cross-period and those numbers are no longer relevant
to the grouped/ungrouped status.
